title: symphyllophyton campos-portoi
intro: Symphyllophyton campos-portoi is a plant species native to Brazil, belonging to the family Rubiaceae and commonly known as "erva-de-são-jorge". The medicinal properties of Symphyllophyton campos-portoi include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it a valuable resource in traditional medicine. The health benefits associated with this plant include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit antioxidant activity. Herbal preparations of Symphyllophyton campos-portoi typically involve infusions or decoctions of the leaves and stems, which are used to treat various health conditions in folk medicine.
